CREATE TABLE TempObject (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE PropertyValues (object_id INT, property_name VARCHAR(100), property_value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO PropertyValues (object_id, property_name, property_value) VALUES (1, 'PI', '3.14159'), (2, 'getDisplayName', 'GMT');
SELECT java_get_property('java.lang.Math', 1, 'PI', 'D') AS PiValue FROM TempObject WHERE id = 1;
WITH obj AS (SELECT id FROM TempObject WHERE name = 'Math') SELECT java_get_property('java.lang.Math', (SELECT id FROM obj), 'PI', 'D');
SELECT java_get_property('java.util.TimeZone', NULL, 'getDisplayName', 'Ljava/lang/String;') AS TimeZoneDisplayName WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM PropertyValues WHERE property_name = 'getDisplayName');
SELECT ja1.property_value FROM PropertyValues AS ja1 JOIN PropertyValues AS ja2 ON ja1.object_id = ja2.object_id WHERE ja1.property_name = 'PI' AND ja2.property_name = 'getDisplayName';
